title: Kira and the Missing Bananas
synopsis: When all the bananas disappear from the jungle, young detective Kira must follow the clues to solve the mystery. With help from her diverse group of animal friends, she discovers that sometimes the biggest mysteries have the silliest solutions.

pages.text: Kira was a smart little monkey who loved solving puzzles. She had curly brown fur and bright green eyes that sparkled when she was thinking. Every morning, Kira ate three yellow bananas for breakfast. But today was different. Today, there were no bananas anywhere!

illustration.description: A young monkey with curly brown fur and bright green eyes looking confused in a colorful jungle kitchen. Empty banana bowls sit on a wooden table. Sunlight streams through green leaves creating dappled patterns. The monkey has large expressive eyes and appears puzzled.
illustration.alt: Kira the monkey looking at empty banana bowls in her jungle kitchen

pages.text: "This is very strange," said Kira. She scratched her head with one finger. "Where did all the bananas go?" Kira decided to ask her friends. Maybe they knew what happened to the missing bananas. She swung from vine to vine, looking for clues.

illustration.description: Kira swinging on jungle vines with a determined expression, her curly fur flowing in the breeze. Lush green jungle surrounds her with colorful tropical flowers. Her big green eyes show curiosity and determination. Dappled sunlight filters through the canopy above.
illustration.alt: Kira swinging through the jungle on vines looking for clues

pages.text: First, she found Zara the zebra drinking water by the river. Zara had black and white stripes and a kind smile. "Good morning, Zara!" called Kira. "Have you seen any bananas today?" Zara shook her head. "No bananas here, Kira. But I did see yellow peels by the big oak tree."

illustration.description: A friendly zebra with black and white stripes standing by a sparkling blue river, talking to Kira the monkey. The zebra has large kind eyes and a gentle expression. Tropical plants and flowers frame the water scene with rich greens and blues.
illustration.alt: Zara the zebra talking to Kira by the river

pages.text: Kira thanked Zara and hurried to the big oak tree. Sure enough, there were banana peels everywhere! "Aha!" said Kira. "Someone was here eating bananas." She looked around for more clues. The peels made a trail leading deeper into the jungle.

illustration.description: Kira examining yellow banana peels scattered around the base of a massive oak tree. Her expression shows excitement at finding clues. The tree has thick brown bark and sprawling roots. Colorful jungle flowers and plants surround the scene with vibrant greens and yellows.
illustration.alt: Kira discovering banana peels around the big oak tree

pages.text: Next, she met Diego the parrot sitting on a branch. Diego had bright red, blue, and yellow feathers. "Diego, have you seen who ate all these bananas?" asked Kira. Diego flapped his colorful wings. "I saw someone with a long trunk walking this way. They looked very happy!"

illustration.description: A vibrant parrot with red, blue, and yellow feathers perched on a jungle branch, talking to Kira below. The parrot has large expressive eyes and animated gestures. Lush green leaves and exotic flowers create a tropical backdrop with rich saturated colors.
illustration.alt: Diego the colorful parrot giving Kira information about the mystery

pages.text: "A long trunk?" wondered Kira. "That sounds like Elena the elephant!" Kira followed the banana peel trail. It led to a clearing where she could hear loud munching sounds. CRUNCH, CRUNCH, CRUNCH! Someone was definitely eating something very tasty.

illustration.description: Kira creeping through jungle foliage toward a sunny clearing, following a trail of banana peels. Her expression shows curiosity and excitement. Dappled sunlight creates patterns on the forest floor. Tropical plants in rich greens frame the path leading to the mysterious clearing.
illustration.alt: Kira following the banana peel trail through the jungle

pages.text: In the clearing, Kira found Elena the elephant. Elena was gray with kind brown eyes and flowers tucked behind her ears. But Elena wasn't eating bananas. She was eating crunchy apples! "Elena," called Kira, "have you seen all the missing bananas?"

illustration.description: A gentle gray elephant with flowers behind her ears eating red apples in a sunny jungle clearing. She has large kind brown eyes and a sweet expression. Colorful wildflowers dot the grassy clearing with golden sunlight streaming down through the trees.
illustration.alt: Elena the elephant eating apples in a peaceful jungle clearing

pages.text: Elena pointed with her trunk to a pile of banana peels. "I found these this morning, but no bananas were left. Just empty peels!" This was very puzzling. Who could eat bananas so fast that only peels remained? Kira needed to think harder about this mystery.

illustration.description: Elena pointing her trunk toward a large pile of yellow banana peels while Kira looks on with a thinking expression. The elephant appears helpful and concerned. Bright jungle flowers and green plants surround them in the sunny clearing with warm golden light.
illustration.alt: Elena showing Kira the pile of empty banana peels

pages.text: Suddenly, Kira heard a tiny voice. "Excuse me, excuse me!" A small ant named Amit crawled up to them. Amit wore a tiny blue hat and looked worried. "I saw what happened to your bananas," he squeaked. "Follow me, but be very quiet!"

illustration.description: A tiny ant wearing a small blue hat standing on a leaf, talking to Kira and Elena. The ant has large expressive eyes despite being small. The perspective shows both the tiny ant and the much larger animals in the same frame, creating a whimsical size contrast.
illustration.alt: Amit the ant in a blue hat talking to Kira and Elena

pages.text: Amit led them to a banana tree. At the bottom, they saw something amazing. Baby monkeys were having a banana-eating contest! There was little Max, Sophia, and Chen. Their cheeks were so full of bananas, they looked like fuzzy balloons! "We wanted to surprise everyone," mumbled Max through his full mouth.

illustration.description: Three adorable baby monkeys with puffed-out cheeks full of bananas sitting under a banana tree. One has light fur, one has dark fur, and one has reddish fur. Their big eyes show mischief and embarrassment. Banana peels are scattered around them in the grass.
illustration.alt: Three baby monkeys with cheeks full of bananas under a banana tree

pages.text: "We were practicing for the jungle talent show," said Sophia, spitting out banana pieces. "We wanted to see who could eat the most bananas the fastest!" Chen nodded and hiccupped. "But we got too full and couldn't finish them all. Sorry, Kira!"

illustration.description: The three baby monkeys looking sheepish and apologetic, with Kira laughing at their silly explanation. Elena and other jungle friends are gathered around, all with amused expressions. The scene is warm and friendly with golden jungle light filtering through the trees.
illustration.alt: The baby monkeys apologizing to Kira and the other jungle friends

pages.text: Everyone laughed at the silly mystery. "Next time, just ask before taking all the bananas," giggled Kira. "We can all share!" The baby monkeys promised to ask first. Elena shared her apples, and Diego found more bananas in the tall trees. Soon everyone was happy and full. The mystery was solved!

illustration.description: All the jungle friends sharing fruit together in the sunny clearing - Kira, the baby monkeys, Elena, Diego, Zara, and Amit. Everyone has big happy smiles and the scene radiates friendship and joy. Colorful fruits are spread on a blanket with golden sunlight warming the scene.
illustration.alt: All the jungle friends sharing fruit and celebrating together

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What was missing from Kira's breakfast?
questions.explanation: Kira always ate bananas for breakfast, but they were all missing that morning!

questions.question: Who gave Kira the first clue about banana peels?
questions.explanation: Zara the zebra told Kira she saw yellow banana peels by the big oak tree.

questions.question: What was Diego the parrot's clue about?
questions.explanation: Diego saw someone with a long trunk, which made Kira think of Elena the elephant.

questions.question: Who really ate all the bananas?
questions.explanation: The baby monkeys Max, Sophia, and Chen ate all the bananas during their eating contest practice.

questions.question: Why did the baby monkeys eat so many bananas?
choices: They were practicing for a talent show
questions.explanation: The baby monkeys were practicing for the jungle talent show by having a banana-eating contest.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.instructions: Help complete the story by choosing the right words!
pages.text: Kira was a smart little _____ who loved solving puzzles. She found _____ peels by the big oak tree. The baby monkeys had their cheeks full of _____!

pages.title: Mystery Clues
pages.instructions: Choose the correct words to match the clues Kira found!
pages.text: _____ the zebra saw yellow peels. _____ the parrot saw someone with a long trunk. _____ the ant knew where the banana thieves were hiding!
